data.title: Eliminating Social Security Income Taxes Would Cost $1.5 Trillion And Deplete The Trust Fund By 2032—Who Wins And Who Loses?
Bristol Myers Cancer Drug Opdivo In Combination With Chemo Shows Improved Overall Survival In Certain Patients With Lung Cancer
data.description: Bristol Myers' Opdivo improved overall survival in resectable NSCLC, per final Phase 3 data. The study confirms its benefit when combined with chemotherapy.

data.title: Here's How Much You Would Have Made Owning Murphy USA Stock In The Last 10 Years
Microsoft Joins Quantum Computing Battle with Majorana 1, Challenging Google, Nvidia's Advances
data.description: Microsoft launched Majorana 1, a new quantum chip leveraging topoconductor, aiming for solving industrial-scale problems. Partners with Quantumium and Atom Computing.

data.title: Black Sesame emerges as dark horse in driving technology race
data.description:
Key Takeaways:


	Black Sesame’s revenue rose about 52% last year, though the growth rate slowed from the first half to the second half
	The company’s gross margin improved notably in the first half of last year as its products were included in two mass-produced vehicles


  

By Doug Young
